title: Doctor Stranger
desc: Seung‑hee reveals her past to Soo‑hyun, leaving Hoon caught between love and guilt. As political manipulation rises, Seung‑hee accepts risk to keep Hoon and his mother out of danger.

title: Aye Zindagi
desc: A series of events unfold after an orphaned boy gets adopted by a family with several daughters. With time, the mother develops a deep attachment to her adopted son.

title: Pyaar Tune Kya Kiya
desc: The host narrates different stories of love and loss, depicting the drastic steps that young lovers take to protect their relationship.

title: 18 Again
desc: A middle-aged man is weighed down by setbacks in both his marriage and his career. However, fate gives him a chance to turn things around by transforming him into his 18-year-old self.

title: Strong Girl Bong-Soon
desc: Bong-soon gets hired as a bodyguard to Min-hyuk, a video game company's CEO. When she finds herself falling in love with her employer, she gets torn between him and her childhood crush, Guk-doo.

title: Fear Files
